resources.string: Temperament\nCalculator 📈
Not to be confused with a temperature calculator.
About This App ℹ️

This app is made Assessment 2 of Android Development for Creative Computing L5. The purpose of this app is to graph and display your temperament.\n\nKnowing your temperament allows you to discover how your brain is wired to think, and make decisions.
Start ❇️
About ℹ️
Home 🏠
Exit 👋
Dark 🌙
Light ☀️
Default
Changing Theme…
Starting Calculator…
Calculating Temperament…
Stage %1$d\nQuestion %2$d
How do you usually behave when meeting new people?
I stay relaxed and let conversations unfold naturally
I introduce myself confidently and directly
I greet people warmly and start conversations easily
I observe first and engage thoughtfully
When starting a simple task, what describes your approach?
I take it slow and steady
I jump in and get it done quickly
I bring energy and make it enjoyable
I plan the steps before beginning
How do you respond when someone casually asks for help?
I assist calmly without making it complicated
I take charge and solve it efficiently
I help with enthusiasm and encouragement
I understand the need and offer a careful solution
How do you act in a relaxed group setting?
I stay easygoing and blend in comfortably
I naturally guide the flow of the group
I keep the energy lively and engaging
I observe dynamics and contribute thoughtfully
When a challenge appears unexpectedly, how do you react?
I stay composed and adapt gradually
I confront it head‑on and take control
I stay optimistic and look for creative solutions
I pause to analyze the details before acting
When conflict arises, what is your instinctive response?
I stay calm and keep things grounded
I step in and push for resolution
I ease tension and lighten the mood
I reflect to understand the root cause
How do you behave when working under pressure?
I stay steady and avoid unnecessary stress
I push forward decisively to meet the goal
I stay upbeat and keep morale high
I focus deeply and maintain accuracy
How do you respond when someone disagrees with you?
I listen openly and stay calm
I assert my view and seek clarity
I explore alternatives with positivity
I analyze their reasoning carefully
How do you behave when entering a social gathering?
I stay relaxed and observe first
I move with purpose and take initiative
I greet people energetically
I approach interactions thoughtfully
When sharing ideas, what describes you best?
I share calmly and avoid overwhelming others
I present ideas decisively
I express ideas with excitement
I explain ideas thoroughly
How do you behave when someone interrupts your plans?
I adjust smoothly
I redirect and stay in control
I adapt quickly and stay positive
I reorganize the plan carefully
How do you react when someone shares exciting news?
I respond warmly but calmly
I acknowledge it confidently
I celebrate enthusiastically
I appreciate the meaning behind it
When planning something important, how do you approach it?
I keep things simple and steady
I set goals and move quickly
I brainstorm possibilities
I analyze every detail
How do you respond when things don’t go as expected?
I stay calm and adjust
I push through obstacles
I stay positive and adapt
I reflect and refine my approach
When working toward a long‑term goal, how do you stay on track?
I maintain a steady pace
I push forward with determination
I keep things engaging and fun
I follow a structured plan
How do you respond when someone relies on you for something important?
I support them calmly and reliably
I take charge and ensure it gets done
I encourage them with positivity
I handle it seriously and precisely
Calculator Results
Phlegmatic-
Choleric+
Sanguine+
Melancholic-
Coordinate Score: %1$d, %2$d
Repeat ♾️
